results.title: NFL taking 2030 Super Bowl to Nashville and Titans' new enclosed stadium
results.description: NASHVILLE — The NFL is taking the 2030 Super Bowl to Nashville and the Tennessee Titans' new Nissan Stadium after team owners voted Tuesday to hold the league's championship game in the Music City for the first time.

results.title: Elkhart golf improves to 12-1 with two wins
results.description: Ben Divido shot a 36 to earn medalist honors, as the Elkhart boys golf team won a pair of Northern Indiana Conference matches on Monday.

results.title: Game 3 coming: Mars Hill forced into final showdown
USMNT World Cup roster: Projecting Mauricio Pochettino's 26 players
results.description: In just one week, U.S. men's national team head coach Mauricio Pochettino will name the 26 players he will take to the World Cup. Here's our guess.
